Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Malachai's Loop Harmonic Spirit Shield Energy Shield: 222 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.1146 Unique ID: 4304222aec142f4c0b356c28e63345de0fc4ab913bf7d22ea1ca2f7a5eab7c88 Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-B LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 1 +5% Chance to Block 214% increased Energy Shield +2 to Maximum Power Charges 20% chance to gain a Power Charge on Hit 16% increased Spell Damage per Power Charge Lose all Power Charges on reaching Maximum Power Charges Shocks you when you reach Maximum Power Charges Corrupted
